# React Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a modern React website built with TypeScript, Vite, and React Router. It includes a responsive design, multiple pages, and a contact form.

## Technology Stack
- React 18 with TypeScript
- Vite for fast development and builds
- React Router for client-side routing
- ESLint for code quality
- CSS for styling with light/dark mode support

## Key Commands
- `npm install` - Install dependencies
- `npm run dev` - Start development server (runs on http://localhost:5173)
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Project Structure
- `src/components/` - Reusable React components
- `src/pages/` - Page components (Home, About, Contact)
- `src/App.tsx` - Main application component with routing
- `public/` - Static assets
- `index.html` - HTML entry point

## Common Tasks
- **Add a new page**: Create component in `src/pages/`, add route in `src/App.tsx`, update Navigation
- **Add styling**: Create `.css` file alongside component or update existing styles
- **Modify routing**: Edit `src/App.tsx` Routes section

## Development Notes
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow existing component patterns
- Keep components focused and reusable
- Update README.md when adding significant features
